caption: A live stream broadcast from "CASEBREAKS.COM" features a man with short dark hair wearing a black hooded sweatshirt. He is seated behind a desk with a microphone, positioned in a small inset window on the right side of the screen. The main display is a white webpage featuring a list of NBA team abbreviations and a chat log. The text on the page specifies a "2021-22 Panini Mosaic Basketball Hobby 1-Pack Break 'RT'" with "30 spots." A chatbot named Nightbot provides a link: "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/3SedsK9". As the sequence progresses, the list of team abbreviations is gradually filled in with blue highlighted boxes. The final frame shows a product image of a "2021-22 NBA Draft" pack of cards and text announcing "*19X CROWN ROYALE PYT #5 TEAM GIVEAWAY*".
